# BiteOrNot

BiteOrNot is a mobile app that gives one fast product decision: PASS, CHECK, or AVOID.

It helps users check food products against selected restrictions such as allergies, diets, health conditions, or ingredients to avoid.

Core flow:
Scan barcode -> check product data -> show PASS, CHECK, or AVOID.

Fallback:
If a product is not found or product data is missing, the user can scan the ingredients or nutrition label and get a conservative result.

BiteOrNot is not medical advice.
BiteOrNot is not a calorie tracker, meal diary, recipe app, diet coach, or health score app.

When product data is missing or unclear, BiteOrNot shows CHECK.

Pricing:
Free: 1 active restriction at a time, 15 scans per day.
Pro: $4.99/month or $39.99/year, multiple active restrictions.

Important pages:
